news.title: Meta stock drops as capex, user growth numbers come in below Wall Street estimates
news.description: Meta beat on revenue, but showed disappointing user numbers and its capital expenditures were below estimates.

news.title: Microsoft beats on top and bottom lines with 40% Azure growth
news.description: Microsoft's Azure growth beat consensus, and corporate adoption of the Copilot artificial intelligence assistant is growing. Capital expenditures fell short.

news.title: Alphabet beats on revenue, with cloud booming 63% and topping $20 billion
news.description: Alphabet reported first-quarter earnings after the bell Wednesday.

news.title: Amazon stock dips even as earnings beat expectations with strong cloud growth
news.description: Amazon reported its first-quarter results after the market close on Wednesday.

news.title: Chipotle posts surprise same-store sales growth in early sign chain could be breaking its slump
news.description: Chipotle shares have plummeted 35% over the last year.

news.title: Savings rates drop even without Fed cuts. Here’s where you can still earn 4% on your cash
news.description: While the Federal Reserve's hold on rate cuts is generally good news for savers, there have already been some banks that have lowered their payouts anyway.

news.title: Ford raises 2026 guidance as $1.3 billion tariff refund assists in offsetting higher costs
news.description: Aside from earnings and any changes to the automaker's 2026 guidance, investors will be monitoring effects from the Iran war, tariffs and the pullback in EVs.

news.title: Amazon's cloud unit reports 28% sales growth, topping estimates
news.description: Amazon Web Services now accounts for over 20% of its parent company's total revenue.

news.title: Four key takeaways from Jerome Powell's last rate decision as Fed chair
news.description: Powell's news conference after holding rates covered the US-Israel war with Iran, inflation, legal attacks, and the Fed's independence

news.title: Oil price briefly hits $120 after reports of 'extended' Iran blockade
news.description: The price of crude oil has swung sharply as uncertainty over the war in the Middle East continues.

news.title: 'Numbskull, moron and too stupid': Trump and Powell's biggest clashes
news.description: How the US President Donald Trump and Federal Reserve chair Jerome Powell came to blows.

news.title: In five charts - How UAE's exit could affect Opec's influence over the oil price
news.description: The BBC takes a look in charts at what the UAE's departure could mean for the oil cartel and more widely.

news.title: Advert for £49 serum banned over 'five years younger' claim
news.description: Eucerin asked 160 people to use the serum for four weeks then say how much younger they thought they looked.

news.title: Why Spotify has no button to filter out AI music
news.description: Music streamer Deezer allows users to filter out AI music, so why does Spotify not offer the same?

news.title: A fresh financial crisis may be coming - it won't play out like the last one
news.description: Several warning lights are flashing that have some wondering whether we are in the foothills of another financial crisis.

news.title: Why has the UAE left Opec - and why does this matter?
news.description: The United Arab Emirates (UAE) is quitting oil cartel Opec after nearly 60 years of membership.

news.title: Amazon's cloud unit reports 28% sales growth, topping estimates
news.description: Amazon Web Services now accounts for over 20% of its parent company's total revenue.

news.title: Meta’s Reality Labs lost over $4 billion in first quarter
news.description: In Meta's first-quarter earnings report, the company said Reality Labs recorded an operating loss of over $4 billion while bringing in $402 million in sales.

news.title: PayPal's new CEO makes Venmo a standalone business unit as potential buyers circle
news.description: PayPal is betting that a new corporate structure can reignite growth at a company that has lost ground to Apple, Google and Stripe in the e-commerce battle.

news.title: Robinhood's revenue slump exposes crypto's core weakness
news.description: Crypto still struggles to generate stable, nonspeculative revenue despite years of growth, innovation and institutional acceptance.

news.title: We toured an AI data center to see how our stock names make these facilities work
news.description: CoreSite CEO Juan Font thinks of his company's facilities like shopping malls.

news.title: NXP Semiconductors soars 26%, best day ever after earnings beat
news.description: Shares rose 26% Wednesday, the biggest surge since the Dutch chipmaker went public in 2010.

news.title: Meta stock drops as capex, user growth numbers come in below Wall Street estimates
news.description: Meta beat on revenue, but showed disappointing user numbers and its capital expenditures were below estimates.

news.title: Microsoft beats on top and bottom lines with 40% Azure growth
news.description: Microsoft's Azure growth beat consensus, and corporate adoption of the Copilot artificial intelligence assistant is growing. Capital expenditures fell short.

chinaNews.title: Alphabet营收同比增长22% 净利润同比增长81% 云业务加速增长
chinaNews.description: Alphabet今日公布了截至2026年3月31日的第一季度财务业绩。合并营收为1099亿美元，同比增长22%（按固定汇率计算增长19%），为连续第11个季度实现双位数增长。

chinaNews.title: 微软营收同比增18% 利润同比增20% 云计算与AI驱动业绩增长
chinaNews.description: 微软公司今日公布了截至2026年3月31日的第三季度业绩，与上一财年同期相比：营收为829亿美元，同比增长18%（按固定汇率计算增长15%）营业利润为384亿美元...

chinaNews.title: 4月30日美股成交额前20：英特尔大涨逾12%创历史新高
chinaNews.description: 周三美股成交额第1名英伟达收跌1.83%，成交251.59亿美元。该股周一创历史新高之后已连续两日走低，不过市值仍维持在5万亿美元之上。

chinaNews.title: 韦德布什大幅上调闪迪目标价至1200美元
chinaNews.description: 韦德布什证券公司周三发布研报，将闪迪目标价从740美元大幅上调至1200美元，上调幅度达62%，同时维持对该股的“跑赢大盘”评级。

chinaNews.title: AMD周三大涨4.3%，此前获萨斯奎哈纳唱好
chinaNews.description: AMD周三大涨4.3%，此前萨斯奎哈纳国际集团周三发布研报，将AMD目标价从300美元上调至375美元，重申对该股的积极评级。 该机构分析师克里斯托弗·罗兰在报告中指出...
